zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Musgrave於大約1415年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親Sir Richard Musgrave II20歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Betham18歲。她和Thomas Middleton至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1475年在英國維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Musgrave于大约1415年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲Sir Richard Musgrave II20岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Betham18岁。她和Thomas Middleton至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1475年在英国維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Musgrave was born about 1415, in Westmorland, England, her father, Sir Richard Musgrave II, was 20 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Betham, was 18. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Thomas Middleton. She died in 1475, in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Musgrave est née environ 1415, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Musgrave II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Betham, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Thomas Middleton. Elle est décédée en 1475, à Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Musgrave um 1415 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Musgrave II 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Betham 18. Sie hatte mit Thomas Middleton mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1475 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Musgrave è nata il circa 1415 nel Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Musgrave II, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Betham, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Thomas Middleton. Morì nel 1475, nel Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Middleton, Westmoreland, England: イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドミッドレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Musgraveが約1415年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Musgrave IIは20歳，母Lady Elizabeth Bethamは18歳であった。彼女はThomas Middletonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1475年にイギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Musgrave(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Musgrave II(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Betham(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Middleton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 커k비 스티븐에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Middleton, Westmoreland, England: Middleton, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Musgrave nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Musgrave II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Betham, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Thomas Middleton. Ela faleceu em 1475, em Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Musgrave родилась около 1415 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Musgrave II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Betham, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Thomas Middleton. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности киркби стифен, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Musgrave nació aproximadamente 1415, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Musgrave II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Betham, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Thomas Middleton. Murió en 1475, en Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
